title: Puddle Steps
poem_text:
Splish splash, jump so high,
Drip drop, touch the sky.
Crunch crunch, walk so slow,
Squelch squelch, soft and low.
Pop pop, bubbles rise,
Fizz fizz, in my eyes.
Buzz buzz, wings take flight,
Hush hush, say goodnight.
cover_context: A child in rain boots splashing in a sunlit puddle, surrounded by floating bubbles and fireflies.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, xylophone and soft claps, 107 BPM, dreamy and wondering, spacious, leaves room to think, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
